titlestmt.titleproper: Tompkins County American Red Cross records6985
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-10-17 18:38:50 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Tompkins County American Red Cross records
did.abstract: Includes minutes of meetings, scrapbooks, ledgers, memos, photographs, awards, and correspondence.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 href="mailto:rareref@cornell.edu" >rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes minutes of meetings, scrapbooks, ledgers, memos, photographs, awards, and correspondence.

emph.ref: Series V. Subject Files – Chronological Order

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Tompkins County American Red Cross records. #6985. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Tompkins County Chapter-Board of Directors, Executive Committee, Administrative Committee, and various other committee meeting minutes; Treasurer's reports and other reports

In the Wake of Disaster; An Episode in the Life of Nature's Little People

Historical Timeline and Events-Tompkins County Chapter
Historical Highlights of the Tompkins County Chapter

Harlem Rockets Game-Sponsored by Red Cross
"September 12th" About Sculpture Donated to Tompkins County Red Cross
Partnering to Address Food Needs in a Disaster
Panel Discussion on Emergency Management for Seniors-Response
Tompkins County Chapter-Reports, Newspaper clippings, Memos, Calendars

Tompkins County Chapter-Meeting Minutes, Reports, Newspaper Clippings
Tompkins County Chapter-Reports, Memos, Newspaper Clippings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes newspaper clipping from the Ithaca Journal, Cornell Daily Sun and Syracuse and county papers, publicizing Red Cross efforts in the local communities during World War II.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newspaper clippings of local servicemen either killed or wounded during World War II.

did.unittitle: Scrapbook-Ithaca's War Effort with Red Cross
Plaque-Community Leader-Room Furnished by Contributions in Memory of Natalie Miller
Plaque-Eastern New York Territory Honor Chapter Sward
David Malcom Award to Terry Garahan and Lt. John Beau Saul
Cardboard American Junior Red Cross Carton
Mission Statement of the American Red Cross
Map depicting Red Cross in the World
